_next_available_id: Open data/best-practices.json, find the highest existing "id" value, and use the next number up. As of the last update, the highest id is 75 — so your next new entry should be 76.

template.title: Short, actionable title (max ~10 words)
template.desc: 2–4 sentence explanation: what the practice is, why it matters, and when to use it.
template.source: Session 3 Demo (or wherever this came from)

_example_filled_in.title: Run a smoke test before every client demo
_example_filled_in.desc: Five minutes before any client-facing demo, click through the three or four most common user paths in your tool. This catches the embarrassing breakages that unit tests miss — broken buttons, missing data, slow load times — before a client ever sees them.
